- `drilldowns` (Attributes List) Optional drilldowns for this chart (max 100 per Kibana API). Each entry sets exactly one of `dashboard_drilldown`, `discover_drilldown`, or `url_drilldown`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--drilldowns))
- `esql_metric` (Attributes) Typed metric column for ES|QL tagclouds. Mutually exclusive with `metric_json`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--esql_metric))
- `esql_tag_by` (Attributes) Typed tag-by column for ES|QL tagclouds. Mutually exclusive with `tag_by_json`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--esql_tag_by))
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--filters))
- `font_size` (Attributes) Minimum and maximum font size for the tags. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--font_size))
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the chart panel border.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the chart title.
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `metric_json` (String) Metric configuration as JSON. Can be a field metric operation (count, unique count, min, max, avg, median, std dev, sum, last value, percentile, percentile ranks), a pipeline operation (differences, moving average, cumulative sum, counter rate), or a formula operation.
 Required for non-ES|QL tagclouds; mutually exclusive with `esql_metric`.
- `orientation` (String) Orientation of the tagcloud. Valid values: 'horizontal', 'vertical', 'angled'.
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. Required for non-ES|QL tagclouds; omit for ES|QL mode. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--query))
- `references_json` (String) Optional normalized JSON array of `{ id, name, type }` saved-object references, matching the chart root API `references` list.
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `tag_by_json` (String) Tag grouping configuration as JSON. Can be a date histogram, terms, histogram, range, or filters operation. This determines how tags are grouped and displayed. Required for non-ES|QL tagclouds; mutually exclusive with `esql_tag_by`.
- `time_range` (Attributes) Chart-level time selection (`from`, `to`, optional `mode`), same shape as the dashboard root `time_range`. When omitted (null), the provider inherits the dashboard-level `time_range` on write and preserves null in state when the API echoes the inherited value on read. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--time_range))
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.

<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--drilldowns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.drilldowns`

Optional:

- `dashboard_drilldown` (Attributes) Navigate to another dashboard using current filters/time range. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--drilldowns--dashboard_drilldown))
- `discover_drilldown` (Attributes) Open Discover with contextual filters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--drilldowns--discover_drilldown))
- `url_drilldown` (Attributes) Open a URL drilldown configured with explicit trigger semantics. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--drilldowns--url_drilldown))

<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--drilldowns--dashboard_drilldown"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.drilldowns.dashboard_drilldown`

Required:

- `dashboard_id` (String) Target dashboard id.
- `label` (String) Human-readable drilldown label.

Optional:

- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, opens the target dashboard in a new browser tab.
- `use_filters` (Boolean) When true, forwards filter context.
- `use_time_range` (Boolean) When true, forwards the time range.

Read-Only:

- `trigger` (String) **Computed** — Kibana fixes this to `on_apply_filter`; reflected in state after apply. Do not set in configuration.


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--drilldowns--discover_drilldown"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.drilldowns.discover_drilldown`

Required:

- `label` (String) Human-readable drilldown label.

Optional:

- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, opens Discover in a new browser tab.

Read-Only:

- `trigger` (String) **Computed** — Kibana fixes this to `on_apply_filter`; reflected in state after apply. Do not set in configuration.


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--drilldowns--url_drilldown"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.drilldowns.url_drilldown`

Required:

- `label` (String) Human-readable drilldown label.
- `trigger` (String) Trigger that fires this drilldown.
- `url` (String) Destination URL.

Optional:

- `encode_url` (Boolean) When true, encodes interpolated URL parameters.
- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, opens the URL in a new browser tab.



<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--esql_metric"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.esql_metric`

Required:

- `column` (String) ES|QL column name for the metric.
- `format_json` (String) Number or other format configuration as JSON (`formatType` union).

Optional:

- `label` (String) Optional label for the metric.


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--esql_tag_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.esql_tag_by`

Required:

- `color_json` (String) Color mapping as JSON (`colorMapping` union).
- `column` (String) ES|QL column for the tag dimension.
- `format_json` (String) Column format as JSON (`formatType` union).

Optional:

- `label` (String) Optional label for the tag-by column.


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.filters`

Required:

- `filter_json` (String) Chart filter as normalized JSON. Must match the Kibana dashboard API for this chart: one of the filter union members (condition, group, DSL, or spatial) described in the dashboards OpenAPI specification.


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--font_size"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.font_size`

Optional:

- `max` (Number) Maximum font size (default: 72, maximum: 120).
- `min` (Number) Minimum font size (default: 18, minimum: 1).


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.query`

Required:

- `expression` (String) Filter expression string.

Optional:

- `language` (String) Query language (default: 'kql').


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--time_range"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.time_range`

Required:

- `from` (String) Start of the chart time range.
- `to` (String) End of the chart time range.

Optional:

- `mode` (String) Optional time range mode. Valid values are `absolute` or `relative`. When the GET API omits `mode`, the provider preserves the prior chart `time_range.mode` from configuration or state (same pattern as REQ-009 on the dashboard `time_range`).



<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--treemap_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.treemap_config`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For non-ES|QL, this specifies the data view or index; for ES|QL, this specifies the ES|QL query dataset.
- `legend` (Attributes) Legend configuration for the treemap chart. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--treemap_config--legend))

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `drilldowns` (Attributes List) Optional drilldowns for this chart (max 100 per Kibana API). Each entry sets exactly one of `dashboard_drilldown`, `discover_drilldown`, or `url_drilldown`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--treemap_config--drilldowns))

- `esql_metrics` (Attributes List) Metric columns for ES|QL treemaps. Mutually exclusive with `metrics_json`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--treemap_config--esql_metrics))
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--treemap_config--filters))
- `group_by_json` (String) Array of breakdown dimensions as JSON (minimum 1). For non-ES|QL, each item can be date histogram, terms, histogram, range, or filters operations; for ES|QL, each item is the column/operation/color configuration.
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the chart panel border.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the chart title.
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `metrics_json` (String) Array of metric configurations as JSON (minimum 1). For non-ES|QL, each item can be a field metric, pipeline metric, or formula; for ES|QL, each item is the column/operation/color/format configuration.
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. Required for non-ES|QL partition charts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--treemap_config--query))
- `references_json` (String) Optional normalized JSON array of `{ id, name, type }` saved-object references, matching the chart root API `references` list.
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `time_range` (Attributes) Chart-level time selection (`from`, `to`, optional `mode`), same shape as the dashboard root `time_range`. When omitted (null), the provider inherits the dashboard-level `time_range` on write and preserves null in state when the API echoes the inherited value on read. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--treemap_config--time_range))
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.
- `value_display` (Attributes) Configuration for displaying values in chart cells. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--treemap_config--value_display))

Required:

- `truncate_after_lines` (Number) Maximum lines before truncating legend items (1-10).
- `visible` (String) Legend visibility: auto, visible, or hidden.

<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--waffle_config--metrics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.waffle_config.metrics`

Required:

- `config_json` (String) Metric operation as JSON.


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--waffle_config--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.waffle_config.query`

Required:

- `expression` (String) Filter expression string.

Optional:

- `language` (String) Query language (default: 'kql').


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--waffle_config--time_range"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.waffle_config.time_range`

Required:

- `from` (String) Start of the chart time range.
- `to` (String) End of the chart time range.

Optional:

- `mode` (String) Optional time range mode. Valid values are `absolute` or `relative`. When the GET API omits `mode`, the provider preserves the prior chart `time_range.mode` from configuration or state (same pattern as REQ-009 on the dashboard `time_range`).


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--waffle_config--value_display"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.waffle_config.value_display`

Required:

- `mode` (String) Value display mode: hidden, absolute, or percentage.

Optional:

- `percent_decimals` (Number) Decimal places for percentage display (0-10).



<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config`

Required:

- `axis` (Attributes) Axis configuration for X, Y, and secondary Y axes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis))
- `decorations` (Attributes) Visual enhancements and styling options for the chart. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--decorations))
- `fitting` (Attributes) Missing data interpolation configuration. Only valid fitting types are applied per chart type. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--fitting))
- `layers` (Attributes List) Chart layers configuration. Minimum 1 layer required. Each layer can be a data layer or reference line layer. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers))
- `legend` (Attributes) Legend configuration for the XY chart. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--legend))

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `drilldowns` (Attributes List) Optional drilldowns for this chart (max 100 per Kibana API). Each entry sets exactly one of `dashboard_drilldown`, `discover_drilldown`, or `url_drilldown`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--drilldowns))
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--filters))
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the chart panel border.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the chart title.
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--query))
- `references_json` (String) Optional normalized JSON array of `{ id, name, type }` saved-object references, matching the chart root API `references` list.
- `time_range` (Attributes) Chart-level time selection (`from`, `to`, optional `mode`), same shape as the dashboard root `time_range`. When omitted (null), the provider inherits the dashboard-level `time_range` on write and preserves null in state when the API echoes the inherited value on read. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--time_range))
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.

<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis`

Optional:

- `x` (Attributes) X-axis (horizontal) configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--x))
- `y` (Attributes) Primary Y-axis configuration with scale and bounds. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y))
- `y2` (Attributes) Secondary Y-axis configuration with scale and bounds. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y2))

<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--x"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis.x`

Optional:

- `domain_json` (String) Axis domain configuration as JSON. Can be 'fit' mode or 'custom' mode with min, max, and optional fit flags.
- `grid` (Boolean) Whether to show grid lines for this axis.
- `label_orientation` (String) Orientation of the axis labels.
- `scale` (String) X-axis scale: linear (numeric), ordinal (categorical), or temporal (dates).
- `ticks` (Boolean) Whether to show tick marks on the axis.
- `title` (Attributes) Axis title configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--x--title))

<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--x--title"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis.x.title`

Optional:

- `value` (String) Axis title text.
- `visible` (Boolean) Whether to show the title.



<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis.y`

Required:

- `domain_json` (String) Y-axis domain configuration as JSON. Can be 'fit' mode or 'custom' mode with min, max, and optional fit flags.

Optional:

- `grid` (Boolean) Whether to show grid lines for this axis.
- `label_orientation` (String) Orientation of the axis labels.
- `scale` (String) Y-axis scale type for data transformation.
- `ticks` (Boolean) Whether to show tick marks on the axis.
- `title` (Attributes) Axis title configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y--title))

<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y--title"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis.y.title`

Optional:

- `value` (String) Axis title text.
- `visible` (Boolean) Whether to show the title.



<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y2"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis.y2`

Required:

- `domain_json` (String) Y-axis domain configuration as JSON. Can be 'fit' mode or 'custom' mode with min, max, and optional fit flags.

Optional:

- `grid` (Boolean) Whether to show grid lines for this axis.
- `label_orientation` (String) Orientation of the axis labels.
- `scale` (String) Y-axis scale type for data transformation.
- `ticks` (Boolean) Whether to show tick marks on the axis.
- `title` (Attributes) Axis title configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y2--title))

<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y2--title"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis.y2.title`

Optional:

- `value` (String) Axis title text.
- `visible` (Boolean) Whether to show the title.




<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--decorations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.decorations`

Optional:

- `fill_opacity` (Number) Area chart fill opacity (0-1 typical, max 2 for legacy).
- `line_interpolation` (String) Line interpolation method.
- `minimum_bar_height` (Number) Minimum bar height in pixels.
- `point_visibility` (String) Show data points on lines. Valid values are: auto, always, never.
- `show_current_time_marker` (Boolean) Show current time marker line.
- `show_end_zones` (Boolean) Show end zones for partial buckets.
- `show_value_labels` (Boolean) Display value labels on data points.


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--fitting"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.fitting`

Required:

- `type` (String) Fitting function type for missing data.

Optional:

- `dotted` (Boolean) Show fitted values as dotted lines.
- `end_value` (String) How to handle the end value for fitting.


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.layers`

Required:

- `type` (String) The type of layer. Valid values: 'area', 'line', 'bar', 'horizontal_bar', 'reference_lines' for NoESQL layers; 'area_chart', 'line_chart', 'bar_chart', 'horizontal_bar_chart', 'reference_lines' for ESQL layers.

Optional:

- `data_layer` (Attributes) Configuration for data layers (area, line, bar charts). Mutually exclusive with `reference_line_layer`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--data_layer))
- `reference_line_layer` (Attributes) Configuration for reference line layers. Mutually exclusive with `data_layer`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--reference_line_layer))

<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--data_layer"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.layers.data_layer`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For ES|QL layers, this specifies the ES|QL query. For standard layers, this specifies the data view and query.
- `y` (Attributes List) Array of Y-axis metrics. Each entry defines a metric to display on the Y-axis. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--data_layer--y))

Optional:

- `breakdown_by_json` (String) Split series configuration as JSON. For ES|QL: column, operation, optional collapse_by, and color mapping. For standard: field, operation, and optional parameters.
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this layer. Default is false.
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `x_json` (String) X-axis configuration as JSON. For ES|QL: column and operation. For standard: field, operation, and optional parameters.

<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--data_layer--y"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.layers.data_layer.y`

Required:

- `config_json` (String) Y-axis metric configuration as JSON. For ES|QL: axis, color, column, and operation. For standard: axis, color, and metric definition.



<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--reference_line_layer"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.layers.reference_line_layer`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For ES|QL layers, this specifies the ES|QL query. For standard layers, this specifies the data view and query.
- `thresholds` (Attributes List) Array of reference line thresholds. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--reference_line_layer--thresholds))

Optional:

- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this layer. Default is false.
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.

<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--reference_line_layer--thresholds"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.layers.reference_line_layer.thresholds`

Optional:

- `axis` (String) Which axis the reference line applies to. Valid values: 'left', 'right'.
- `color_json` (String) Color for the reference line. Can be a static color string or dynamic color configuration as JSON.
- `column` (String) Column to use (for ES|QL layers).
- `fill` (String) Fill direction for reference line. Valid values: 'none', 'above', 'below'.
- `icon` (String) Icon to display on the reference line. Valid values: 'alert', 'asterisk', 'bell', 'bolt', 'bug', 'circle', 'editorComment', 'flag', 'heart', 'mapMarker', 'pinFilled', 'starEmpty', 'starFilled', 'tag', 'triangle'.
- `operation` (String) Operation to apply (for ES|QL: aggregation function; for standard: metric calculation type).
- `stroke_dash` (String) Line style. Valid values: 'solid', 'dashed', 'dotted'.
- `stroke_width` (Number) Line width in pixels.
- `text` (String) Text display option for the reference line. Valid values include: 'auto', 'name', 'none', 'label'.
- `value_json` (String) Metric configuration as JSON (for standard layers). Defines the calculation for the threshold value.




<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--legend"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.legend`

Optional:

- `alignment` (String) Legend alignment when positioned inside the chart. Valid when 'inside' is true.
- `columns` (Number) Number of legend columns when positioned inside the chart (1-5). Valid when 'inside' is true.
- `inside` (Boolean) Position legend inside the chart. When true, use 'columns' and 'alignment'. When false or omitted, use 'position' and 'size'.
- `position` (String) Legend position when positioned outside the chart. Valid when 'inside' is false or omitted.
- `size` (String) Legend size when positioned outside the chart. Valid for left/right outside legends. Values use the Kibana API enum: auto, s, m, l, xl.
- `statistics` (List of String) Statistics to display in legend (maximum 17).
- `truncate_after_lines` (Number) Maximum lines before truncating legend items (1-10).
- `visibility` (String) Legend visibility (auto, visible, hidden).


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--drilldowns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.drilldowns`

Optional:

- `dashboard_drilldown` (Attributes) Navigate to another dashboard using current filters/time range. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--drilldowns--dashboard_drilldown))
- `discover_drilldown` (Attributes) Open Discover with contextual filters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--drilldowns--discover_drilldown))
- `url_drilldown` (Attributes) Open a URL drilldown configured with explicit trigger semantics. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--drilldowns--url_drilldown))

<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--drilldowns--dashboard_drilldown"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.drilldowns.dashboard_drilldown`

Required:

- `dashboard_id` (String) Target dashboard id.
- `label` (String) Human-readable drilldown label.

Optional:

- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, opens the target dashboard in a new browser tab.
- `use_filters` (Boolean) When true, forwards filter context.
- `use_time_range` (Boolean) When true, forwards the time range.

Read-Only:

- `trigger` (String) **Computed** — Kibana fixes this to `on_apply_filter`; reflected in state after apply. Do not set in configuration.


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--drilldowns--discover_drilldown"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.drilldowns.discover_drilldown`

Required:

- `label` (String) Human-readable drilldown label.

Optional:

- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, opens Discover in a new browser tab.

Read-Only:

- `trigger` (String) **Computed** — Kibana fixes this to `on_apply_filter`; reflected in state after apply. Do not set in configuration.


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--drilldowns--url_drilldown"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.drilldowns.url_drilldown`

Required:

- `label` (String) Human-readable drilldown label.
- `trigger` (String) Trigger that fires this drilldown.
- `url` (String) Destination URL.

Optional:

- `encode_url` (Boolean) When true, encodes interpolated URL parameters.
- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, opens the URL in a new browser tab.



<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.filters`

Required:

- `filter_json` (String) Chart filter as normalized JSON. Must match the Kibana dashboard API for this chart: one of the filter union members (condition, group, DSL, or spatial) described in the dashboards OpenAPI specification.


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.query`

Required:

- `expression` (String) Filter expression string.

Optional:

- `language` (String) Query language (default: 'kql').


<a id="nestedatt--panels--vis_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--time_range"></a>
### Nested Schema for `panels.vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.time_range`

Required:

- `from` (String) Start of the chart time range.
- `to` (String) End of the chart time range.

Optional:

- `mode` (String) Optional time range mode. Valid values are `absolute` or `relative`. When the GET API omits `mode`, the provider preserves the prior chart `time_range.mode` from configuration or state (same pattern as REQ-009 on the dashboard `time_range`).






<a id="nestedatt--pinned_panels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pinned_panels`

Required:

- `type` (String) Panel type discriminator for this pinned control entry. Must match exactly one of the four typed `*_control_config` blocks on the same object (for example `options_list_control` with `options_list_control_config`).

Optional:

- `esql_control_config` (Attributes) These blocks apply to the dashboard pinned control bar rather than an in-grid panel. Attribute definitions match the corresponding `panels[]` control configs for the same block names.

Configuration for an ES|QL control. Binds ES|QL variables for the dashboard. Mutually exclusive with `time_slider_control_config`, `options_list_control_config`, `range_slider_control_config`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pinned_panels--esql_control_config))
- `options_list_control_config` (Attributes) These blocks apply to the dashboard pinned control bar rather than an in-grid panel. Attribute definitions match the corresponding `panels[]` control configs for the same block names.

Configuration for an options list control. Provides a dropdown or multi-select filter based on a field in a data view. Mutually exclusive with `time_slider_control_config`, `esql_control_config`, `range_slider_control_config`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pinned_panels--options_list_control_config))
- `range_slider_control_config` (Attributes) These blocks apply to the dashboard pinned control bar rather than an in-grid panel. Attribute definitions match the corresponding `panels[]` control configs for the same block names.

Configuration for a range slider control. Provides a min/max range filter tied to a data view field. Mutually exclusive with `time_slider_control_config`, `esql_control_config`, `options_list_control_config`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pinned_panels--range_slider_control_config))
- `time_slider_control_config` (Attributes) These blocks apply to the dashboard pinned control bar rather than an in-grid panel. Attribute definitions match the corresponding `panels[]` control configs for the same block names.

Configuration for a time slider control. Controls the visible time window within the dashboard's global time range. Mutually exclusive with `esql_control_config`, `options_list_control_config`, `range_slider_control_config`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pinned_panels--time_slider_control_config))

<a id="nestedatt--pinned_panels--esql_control_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pinned_panels.esql_control_config`

Required:

- `control_type` (String) The control type. Allowed values: `STATIC_VALUES`, `VALUES_FROM_QUERY`.
- `esql_query` (String) The ES|QL query used to populate the control's options.
- `selected_options` (List of String) List of currently selected option values for the control.
- `variable_name` (String) The ES|QL variable name that this control binds to.
- `variable_type` (String) The type of ES|QL variable. Allowed values: `fields`, `values`, `functions`, `time_literal`, `multi_values`.

Optional:

- `available_options` (List of String) Pre-populated list of available options shown before the query executes.
- `display_settings` (Attributes) Display configuration for the control widget. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pinned_panels--esql_control_config--display_settings))
- `single_select` (Boolean) When true, restricts the control to single-value selection.
- `title` (String) A human-readable title displayed above the control widget.

<a id="nestedatt--pinned_panels--esql_control_config--display_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pinned_panels.esql_control_config.display_settings`

Optional:

- `hide_action_bar` (Boolean) Whether to hide the action bar on the control.
- `hide_exclude` (Boolean) Whether to hide the exclude option.
- `hide_exists` (Boolean) Whether to hide the exists filter option.
- `hide_sort` (Boolean) Whether to hide the sort option.
- `placeholder` (String) Placeholder text shown when no option is selected.



<a id="nestedatt--pinned_panels--options_list_control_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pinned_panels.options_list_control_config`

Required:

- `data_view_id` (String) The ID of the data view that the control is tied to.
- `field_name` (String) The name of the field in the data view that the control is tied to.

Optional:

- `display_settings` (Attributes) Display preferences for the control widget. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pinned_panels--options_list_control_config--display_settings))
- `exclude` (Boolean) When true, selected options are used as an exclusion filter rather than an inclusion filter.
- `exists_selected` (Boolean) When true, the control filters for documents where the field exists.
- `ignore_validations` (Boolean) Whether the control skips field-level validation against the data view.
- `run_past_timeout` (Boolean) When true, the control continues to show results even when the underlying query times out.
- `search_technique` (String) The technique used to match suggestions. Must be one of `prefix`, `wildcard`, or `exact` when set.
- `selected_options` (List of String) The initially or persistently selected option values. All values are represented as strings.
- `single_select` (Boolean) When true, only one option may be selected at a time.
- `sort` (Attributes) Default sort configuration for the suggestion list. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pinned_panels--options_list_control_config--sort))
- `title` (String) Human-readable label displayed above the control.
- `use_global_filters` (Boolean) Whether the control applies the dashboard's global filters to its own query.

<a id="nestedatt--pinned_panels--options_list_control_config--display_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pinned_panels.options_list_control_config.display_settings`

Optional:

- `hide_action_bar` (Boolean) When true, hides the action bar on the control.
- `hide_exclude` (Boolean) When true, hides the exclude toggle.
- `hide_exists` (Boolean) When true, hides the exists filter option.
- `hide_sort` (Boolean) When true, hides the sort control.
- `placeholder` (String) Placeholder text shown when no option is selected.


<a id="nestedatt--pinned_panels--options_list_control_config--sort"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pinned_panels.options_list_control_config.sort`

Required:

- `by` (String) The field or criterion to sort by. Must be one of `_count` or `_key`.
- `direction` (String) The sort direction. Must be one of `asc` or `desc`.



<a id="nestedatt--pinned_panels--range_slider_control_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pinned_panels.range_slider_control_config`

Required:

- `data_view_id` (String) The ID of the data view that the control is tied to.
- `field_name` (String) The name of the field in the data view that the control is tied to.

Optional:

- `ignore_validations` (Boolean) Whether to suppress validation errors during intermediate states.
- `step` (Number) The step size for the range slider. Stored as float32 to match the Kibana API type and avoid refresh drift.
- `title` (String) A human-readable title for the control.
- `use_global_filters` (Boolean) Whether the control respects dashboard-level filters.
- `value` (List of String) Initial range as a list of exactly 2 strings: [min, max].


<a id="nestedatt--pinned_panels--time_slider_control_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pinned_panels.time_slider_control_config`

Optional:

- `end_percentage_of_time_range` (Number) End of the visible time window as a fraction of the dashboard global range (0.0–1.0). Float32 in state matches the Kibana API and avoids refresh drift.
- `is_anchored` (Boolean) Whether the start of the time window is anchored (fixed), so only the end slides.
- `start_percentage_of_time_range` (Number) Start of the visible time window as a fraction of the dashboard global range (0.0–1.0). Float32 in state matches the Kibana API and avoids refresh drift.



<a id="nestedatt--sections"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections`

Required:

- `grid` (Attributes) The grid coordinates of the section. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--grid))
- `title` (String) The title of the section.

Optional:

- `collapsed` (Boolean) The collapsed state of the section.
- `id` (String) The identifier of the section (API `id`).
- `panels` (Attributes List) The panels to display in the section. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--grid"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.grid`

Required:

- `y` (Number) The Y coordinate.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels`

Required:

- `grid` (Attributes) The grid coordinates and dimensions of the panel. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--grid))
- `type` (String) The type of the panel (e.g. 'markdown', 'vis').

Optional:

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--grid"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.grid`

Required:

- `x` (Number) The X coordinate.
- `y` (Number) The Y coordinate.

Optional:

- `h` (Number) The height.
- `w` (Number) The width.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config`

Optional:

- `by_reference` (Attributes) Reference an existing Discover session saved object via `ref_id`. Client-side `references` JSON is not modeled in v1 (see change design). Omit `selected_tab_id` to let Kibana pick the tab; after apply the resolved id is stored in state. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_reference))
- `by_value` (Attributes) Inline Discover session configuration (`kbn-dashboard-panel-type-discover_session` config branch `0`). Set `tab` with exactly one of `dsl` (data view + query) or `esql`. The API currently restricts Discover tabs to **one** entry, so Terraform exposes a single `tab` object (not `tabs = [...]`); if Kibana raises that limit, a list-based shape could be added later without breaking existing configurations. Omit `time_range` to inherit the dashboard root time range at write time while keeping this block null in Terraform state. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value))
- `description` (String) Optional panel description.
- `drilldowns` (Attributes List) Typed URL drilldowns for this panel. The API only supports `url_drilldown` with trigger `on_open_panel_menu`; those values are set automatically when writing to Kibana. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--drilldowns))
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the panel border.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the panel title.
- `title` (String) Optional panel title.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_reference"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_reference`

Required:

- `ref_id` (String) Discover session saved object reference id (`ref_id` in the API).

Optional:

- `overrides` (Attributes) Optional typed presentation overrides applied on top of the referenced session. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_reference--overrides))
- `selected_tab_id` (String) Tab id within the referenced Discover session. Omit to let Kibana choose; after apply the API value is reflected here.
- `time_range` (Attributes) Optional time range for this panel. When omitted, the dashboard root `time_range` is sent to the API at write time while this attribute stays null in state (REQ-009). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_reference--time_range))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_reference--overrides"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_reference.overrides`

Optional:

- `column_order` (List of String) Overrides column order relative to the referenced Discover session.
- `column_settings` (Attributes Map) Per-column presentation settings keyed by field name (for example column widths). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_reference--overrides--column_settings))
- `density` (String) Overrides data grid density.
- `header_row_height` (String) Overrides header row height: numbers "1"–"5" or "auto".
- `row_height` (String) Overrides data row height: numbers "1"–"20" or "auto".
- `rows_per_page` (Number) Overrides rows per page.
- `sample_size` (Number) Overrides sample size.
- `sort` (Attributes List) Overrides sort configuration relative to the referenced Discover session. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_reference--overrides--sort))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_reference--overrides--column_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_reference.overrides.column_settings`

Optional:

- `width` (Number) Optional column width in pixels.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_reference--overrides--sort"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_reference.overrides.sort`

Required:

- `direction` (String) Sort direction.
- `name` (String) Field name to sort by.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_reference--time_range"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_reference.time_range`

Required:

- `from` (String) Start of the time range (e.g., 'now-15m', '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z').
- `to` (String) End of the time range (e.g., 'now', '2023-12-31T23:59:59Z').

Optional:

- `mode` (String) Time range mode. Valid values are `absolute` or `relative`. When the GET API omits `mode`, the provider preserves the prior `time_range.mode` from configuration or state.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_value`

Required:

- `tab` (Attributes) Single Discover tab configuration (the API currently allows one tab). Exactly one of `dsl` or `esql` must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab))

Optional:

- `time_range` (Attributes) Optional time range for this panel. When omitted, the dashboard root `time_range` is sent to the API at write time while this attribute stays null in state (REQ-009). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--time_range))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_value.tab`

Optional:

- `dsl` (Attributes) DSL / data view Discover tab. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--dsl))
- `esql` (Attributes) ES|QL Discover tab. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--esql))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--dsl"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_value.tab.dsl`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Normalized JSON for the tab `data_source` field. Author an object that matches the **Kibana Dashboard API** schema for `kbn-dashboard-panel-type-discover_session` tabs: for `tab.dsl`, the polymorphic DSL data-source union (`data_view_reference`, `data_view_spec`, etc. — see the OpenAPI bundled with the [Kibana REST API reference](https://www.elastic.co/docs/api/doc/kibana)); for `tab.esql`, use the ES|QL data-source shape (`type = "esql"` plus query and related fields).

Use **`ref_id`** for `data_view_reference` links (not `id`). Semantic JSON equality suppresses drift from key ordering or whitespace.
- `query` (Attributes) Kibana query used by this DSL Discover tab (KQL or Lucene). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--dsl--query))

Optional:

- `column_order` (List of String) Ordered list of field names shown in the Discover grid.
- `column_settings` (Attributes Map) Per-column presentation settings keyed by field name (for example column widths). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--dsl--column_settings))
- `density` (String) Data grid density.
- `filters` (Attributes List) Optional Discover filters for the DSL tab. Each element is API-shaped filter JSON (`filter_json`), matching dashboard-root `filters` and chart filters (REQ-037). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--dsl--filters))
- `header_row_height` (String) Header row height: numbers "1"–"5" (as decimal strings) or "auto".
- `row_height` (String) Data row height: numbers "1"–"20" (as decimal strings) or "auto".
- `rows_per_page` (Number) Rows per page in the Discover grid.
- `sample_size` (Number) Sample size (documents) for the Discover grid.
- `sort` (Attributes List) Sort configuration for the Discover grid. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--dsl--sort))
- `view_mode` (String) Discover view mode for the DSL tab: `documents` (hits), `patterns`, or `aggregated` (field statistics). Matches the Kibana Dashboard API enum values.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--dsl--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_value.tab.dsl.query`

Required:

- `expression` (String) Filter expression string.

Optional:

- `language` (String) Query language (default: 'kql').


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--dsl--column_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_value.tab.dsl.column_settings`

Optional:

- `width` (Number) Optional column width in pixels.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--dsl--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_value.tab.dsl.filters`

Required:

- `filter_json` (String) Chart filter as normalized JSON. Must match the Kibana dashboard API for this chart: one of the filter union members (condition, group, DSL, or spatial) described in the dashboards OpenAPI specification.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--dsl--sort"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_value.tab.dsl.sort`

Required:

- `direction` (String) Sort direction.
- `name` (String) Field name to sort by.

### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_value.tab.esql`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Normalized JSON for the tab `data_source` field. Author an object that matches the **Kibana Dashboard API** schema for `kbn-dashboard-panel-type-discover_session` tabs: for `tab.dsl`, the polymorphic DSL data-source union (`data_view_reference`, `data_view_spec`, etc. — see the OpenAPI bundled with the [Kibana REST API reference](https://www.elastic.co/docs/api/doc/kibana)); for `tab.esql`, use the ES|QL data-source shape (`type = "esql"` plus query and related fields).

Use **`ref_id`** for `data_view_reference` links (not `id`). Semantic JSON equality suppresses drift from key ordering or whitespace.

Optional:

- `column_order` (List of String) Ordered list of field names shown in the Discover grid.
- `column_settings` (Attributes Map) Per-column presentation settings keyed by field name (for example column widths). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--esql--column_settings))
- `density` (String) Data grid density.
- `header_row_height` (String) Header row height: numbers "1"–"5" (as decimal strings) or "auto".
- `row_height` (String) Data row height: numbers "1"–"20" (as decimal strings) or "auto".
- `sort` (Attributes List) Sort configuration for the Discover grid. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--esql--sort))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--esql--column_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_value.tab.esql.column_settings`

Optional:

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--tab--esql--sort"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_value.tab.esql.sort`

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--by_value--time_range"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.by_value.time_range`

Required:

- `from` (String) Start of the time range (e.g., 'now-15m', '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z').
- `to` (String) End of the time range (e.g., 'now', '2023-12-31T23:59:59Z').

Optional:

- `mode` (String) Time range mode. Valid values are `absolute` or `relative`. When the GET API omits `mode`, the provider preserves the prior `time_range.mode` from configuration or state.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--discover_session_config--drilldowns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.discover_session_config.drilldowns`

Required:

- `label` (String) The display label for the drilldown link.
- `url` (String) The URL template for the drilldown. Variables are documented at https://www.elastic.co/docs/explore-analyze/dashboards/drilldowns#url-template-variable.

Optional:

- `encode_url` (Boolean) When true, the URL is percent-encoded.
- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, the drilldown URL opens in a new browser tab.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--esql_control_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.esql_control_config`

Required:

- `control_type` (String) The control type. Allowed values: `STATIC_VALUES`, `VALUES_FROM_QUERY`.
- `esql_query` (String) The ES|QL query used to populate the control's options.
- `selected_options` (List of String) List of currently selected option values for the control.
- `variable_name` (String) The ES|QL variable name that this control binds to.
- `variable_type` (String) The type of ES|QL variable. Allowed values: `fields`, `values`, `functions`, `time_literal`, `multi_values`.

Optional:

- `available_options` (List of String) Pre-populated list of available options shown before the query executes.
- `display_settings` (Attributes) Display configuration for the control widget. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--esql_control_config--display_settings))
- `single_select` (Boolean) When true, restricts the control to single-value selection.
- `title` (String) A human-readable title displayed above the control widget.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--esql_control_config--display_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.esql_control_config.display_settings`

Optional:

- `hide_action_bar` (Boolean) Whether to hide the action bar on the control.
- `hide_exclude` (Boolean) Whether to hide the exclude option.
- `hide_exists` (Boolean) Whether to hide the exists filter option.
- `hide_sort` (Boolean) Whether to hide the sort option.
- `placeholder` (String) Placeholder text shown when no option is selected.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.image_config`

Required:

- `src` (Attributes) Image source for the panel. Set exactly one nested branch: `file` (uploaded Kibana file id) or `url` (external image URL). Matches the Kibana Dashboard API `kbn-dashboard-panel-type-image` `config.image_config.src` union.

For `file.file_id`, Terraform accepts only the string id returned by Kibana after an upload; creating or deleting the uploaded file is **not** handled by this resource today (use the UI, Saved Objects, or HTTP APIs). A dedicated `elasticstack_kibana_file` resource may be introduced later if practitioners need uploads as code. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config--src))

Optional:

- `alt_text` (String) Accessible alternate text for the image.
- `background_color` (String) Background color behind the image (CSS color string).
- `description` (String) Panel description shown by Kibana.
- `drilldowns` (Attributes List) Optional drilldown actions for the image panel (max 100 entries). Each element sets exactly one of `dashboard_drilldown` or `url_drilldown`, matching the Kibana `kbn-dashboard-panel-type-image` `config.drilldowns` discriminated union. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config--drilldowns))
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, hides the panel border.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, hides the panel title.
- `object_fit` (String) How the image is sized within its panel container. Omit to leave unset; the Kibana API defaults to `contain`. Unset values stay null in Terraform state when the API echoes that default (REQ-009).
- `title` (String) Panel title shown by Kibana.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config--src"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.image_config.src`

Optional:

- `file` (Attributes) Use an uploaded file as the image source. Mutually exclusive with `url` inside `src`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config--src--file))
- `url` (Attributes) Use an external URL as the image source. Mutually exclusive with `file` inside `src`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config--src--url))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config--src--file"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.image_config.src.file`

Required:

- `file_id` (String) Kibana file identifier for the uploaded image.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config--src--url"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.image_config.src.url`

Required:

- `url` (String) HTTPS or HTTP URL of the image.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config--drilldowns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.image_config.drilldowns`

Optional:

- `dashboard_drilldown` (Attributes) Open another dashboard when the image is clicked. Mutually exclusive with `url_drilldown` in the same entry. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config--drilldowns--dashboard_drilldown))
- `url_drilldown` (Attributes) URL drilldown entry. Mutually exclusive with `dashboard_drilldown` in the same list element. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config--drilldowns--url_drilldown))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config--drilldowns--dashboard_drilldown"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.image_config.drilldowns.dashboard_drilldown`

Required:

- `dashboard_id` (String) Target dashboard saved object id.
- `label` (String) Label shown for this drilldown.
- `trigger` (String) Dashboard drilldowns on image panels only support `on_click_image` (see Kibana `kbn-dashboard-panel-type-image` drilldown schema).

Optional:

- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, opens the target dashboard in a new browser tab. Omit for API default (typically `false`).
- `use_filters` (Boolean) When true, passes the current dashboard filters to the opened dashboard. Omit for API default (typically `false`).
- `use_time_range` (Boolean) When true, passes the current time range to the opened dashboard. Omit for API default (typically `false`).


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--image_config--drilldowns--url_drilldown"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.image_config.drilldowns.url_drilldown`

Required:

- `label` (String) Display label for the drilldown.
- `trigger` (String) When this drilldown runs. Allowed values: `on_click_image`, `on_open_panel_menu` (Kibana image panel URL drilldown triggers).
- `url` (String) Templated URL for the drilldown. Variables are documented in the [Kibana drilldown URL template variables](https://www.elastic.co/docs/explore-analyze/dashboards/drilldowns#url-template-variable) section of the Elastic docs.

Optional:

- `encode_url` (Boolean) When true, the URL is percent-encoded. Omit to use the API default; unset stays null when the API echoes the default (REQ-009).
- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, opens in a new browser tab. Omit to use the API default; unset stays null when the API echoes the default (REQ-009).




<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config`

Optional:

- `by_reference` (Attributes) By-reference `lens-dashboard-app` configuration: link a saved Lens visualization via `ref_id`, optional `references_json`, optional structured `drilldowns`, and required `time_range`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_reference))
- `by_value` (Attributes) Inline by-value `lens-dashboard-app` configuration. Set exactly one of `config_json` (raw JSON) or one supported typed Lens chart block, not both. Typed by-value blocks send the chart as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and do not create a `type = "vis"` panel. On read, when state used a typed chart block and the API `config` can be round-tripped into that same block, the provider repopulates the typed block; otherwise the response is reflected in `config_json` instead. Distinct from panel-level `config_json` on the panel. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_reference"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_reference`

Required:

- `ref_id` (String) Reference name in the API `ref_id` field. When `references_json` is set, `ref_id` typically should match a `name` in that list so the link resolves as expected.
- `time_range` (Attributes) Required time range for the by-reference panel config (used by both `lens_dashboard_app_config.by_reference` and `vis_config.by_reference`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_reference--time_range))

Optional:

- `description` (String) Optional panel description.
- `drilldowns` (Attributes List) Structured dashboard, Discover, or URL drilldown entries for by-reference panels — shared by `vis_config.by_reference` (`vis` panels) and `lens_dashboard_app_config.by_reference` (`lens-dashboard-app` panels). Each element must contain exactly one of `dashboard`, `discover`, or `url`; the provider sets API `type` and (for dashboard/discover) `trigger` automatically. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_reference--drilldowns))
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the panel border.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the panel title.
- `references_json` (String) Optional normalized JSON array of `{ id, name, type }` saved-object references, matching the API `references` list (for example wiring a `lens` saved object to `ref_id`).
- `title` (String) Optional panel title.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_reference--time_range"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_reference.time_range`

Required:

- `from` (String) Range start, matching the Kibana time range `from` field.
- `to` (String) Range end, matching the Kibana time range `to` field.

Optional:

- `mode` (String) Optional time range mode. When set, must be `absolute` or `relative`.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_reference--drilldowns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_reference.drilldowns`

Optional:

- `dashboard` (Attributes) Open another dashboard (`dashboard_drilldown`). `dashboard_id` and `label` are required; remaining fields mirror optional API knobs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_reference--drilldowns--dashboard))
- `discover` (Attributes) Open in Discover (`discover_drilldown`). Requires `label`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_reference--drilldowns--discover))
- `url` (Attributes) Custom URL drilldown (`url_drilldown`). Requires `url`, `label`, and `trigger` (one of `on_click_row`, `on_click_value`, `on_open_panel_menu`, `on_select_range`). The Kibana dashboard API rejects URL drilldowns without `trigger`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_reference--drilldowns--url))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_reference--drilldowns--dashboard"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_reference.drilldowns.dashboard`

Required:

- `dashboard_id` (String) Target dashboard ID.
- `label` (String) Display label.

Optional:

- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) Open in a new browser tab when set.
- `use_filters` (Boolean) Pass filters to the target dashboard when set.
- `use_time_range` (Boolean) Pass the current time range to the target dashboard when set.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_reference--drilldowns--discover"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_reference.drilldowns.discover`

Required:

- `label` (String) Display label.

Optional:

- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) Open in a new browser tab when set.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_reference--drilldowns--url"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_reference.drilldowns.url`

Required:

- `label` (String) Display label.
- `trigger` (String) Trigger that activates the drilldown. Required; the Kibana dashboard API rejects URL drilldowns when this field is omitted.
- `url` (String) URL template with variables documented in Kibana URL drilldown documentation.

Optional:

- `encode_url` (Boolean) Escape the URL via percent-encoding when set.
- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) Open in a new browser tab when set.




<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value`

Optional:

- `config_json` (String) Optional raw normalized JSON for the by-value Lens chart `config` (full API shape, including chart `type` and `time_range` where the API requires them). Use as the single `by_value` source, or use one supported typed chart block instead (not both). Distinct from panel-level `config_json` on the panel.
- `datatable_config` (Attributes) Typed Lens chart for a `lens-dashboard-app` by-value panel. The chart is sent as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and does not create a `type = "vis"` panel. Attribute shape matches `vis_config.by_value.datatable_config` for `type = "vis"` panels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config))
- `gauge_config` (Attributes) Typed Lens chart for a `lens-dashboard-app` by-value panel. The chart is sent as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and does not create a `type = "vis"` panel. Attribute shape matches `vis_config.by_value.gauge_config` for `type = "vis"` panels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config))
- `heatmap_config` (Attributes) Typed Lens chart for a `lens-dashboard-app` by-value panel. The chart is sent as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and does not create a `type = "vis"` panel. Attribute shape matches `vis_config.by_value.heatmap_config` for `type = "vis"` panels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--heatmap_config))
- `legacy_metric_config` (Attributes) Typed Lens chart for a `lens-dashboard-app` by-value panel. The chart is sent as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and does not create a `type = "vis"` panel. Attribute shape matches `vis_config.by_value.legacy_metric_config` for `type = "vis"` panels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--legacy_metric_config))
- `metric_chart_config` (Attributes) Typed Lens chart for a `lens-dashboard-app` by-value panel. The chart is sent as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and does not create a `type = "vis"` panel. Attribute shape matches `vis_config.by_value.metric_chart_config` for `type = "vis"` panels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--metric_chart_config))
- `mosaic_config` (Attributes) Typed Lens chart for a `lens-dashboard-app` by-value panel. The chart is sent as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and does not create a `type = "vis"` panel. Attribute shape matches `vis_config.by_value.mosaic_config` for `type = "vis"` panels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--mosaic_config))
- `pie_chart_config` (Attributes) Typed Lens chart for a `lens-dashboard-app` by-value panel. The chart is sent as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and does not create a `type = "vis"` panel. Attribute shape matches `vis_config.by_value.pie_chart_config` for `type = "vis"` panels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--pie_chart_config))
- `region_map_config` (Attributes) Typed Lens chart for a `lens-dashboard-app` by-value panel. The chart is sent as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and does not create a `type = "vis"` panel. Attribute shape matches `vis_config.by_value.region_map_config` for `type = "vis"` panels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--region_map_config))
- `tagcloud_config` (Attributes) Typed Lens chart for a `lens-dashboard-app` by-value panel. The chart is sent as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and does not create a `type = "vis"` panel. Attribute shape matches `vis_config.by_value.tagcloud_config` for `type = "vis"` panels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--tagcloud_config))
- `treemap_config` (Attributes) Typed Lens chart for a `lens-dashboard-app` by-value panel. The chart is sent as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and does not create a `type = "vis"` panel. Attribute shape matches `vis_config.by_value.treemap_config` for `type = "vis"` panels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config))
- `waffle_config` (Attributes) Typed Lens chart for a `lens-dashboard-app` by-value panel. The chart is sent as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and does not create a `type = "vis"` panel. Attribute shape matches `vis_config.by_value.waffle_config` for `type = "vis"` panels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--waffle_config))
- `xy_chart_config` (Attributes) Typed Lens chart for a `lens-dashboard-app` by-value panel. The chart is sent as the Kibana `lens-dashboard-app` API `config` and does not create a `type = "vis"` panel. Attribute shape matches `vis_config.by_value.xy_chart_config` for `type = "vis"` panels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config`

Optional:

- `esql` (Attributes) Datatable configuration for ES|QL queries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql))
- `no_esql` (Attributes) Datatable configuration for standard (non-ES|QL) queries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.esql`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For ES|QL, this specifies the ES|QL query.
- `metrics` (Attributes List) Array of metric configurations as JSON. Each entry defines a datatable metric column. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--metrics))
- `styling` (Attributes) Datatable styling and display configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--styling))

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--filters))
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `rows` (Attributes List) Array of row configurations as JSON. Each entry defines a row split operation. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--rows))
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `split_metrics_by` (Attributes List) Array of split-metrics configurations as JSON. Each entry defines a split operation for metric columns. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--split_metrics_by))
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--metrics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.esql.metrics`

Required:

- `config_json` (String) Metric configuration as JSON.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--styling"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.esql.styling`

Required:

- `density` (Attributes) Density configuration for the datatable. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--styling--density))

Optional:

- `paging` (Number) Enables pagination and sets the number of rows to display per page.
- `sort_by_json` (String) Sort configuration as JSON. Only one column can be sorted at a time.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--styling--density"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.esql.styling.density`

Optional:

- `height` (Attributes) Header and value height configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--styling--density--height))
- `mode` (String) Density mode. Valid values: 'compact', 'default', 'expanded'.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--styling--density--height"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.esql.styling.density.height`

Optional:

- `header` (Attributes) Header height configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--styling--density--height--header))
- `value` (Attributes) Value height configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--styling--density--height--value))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--styling--density--height--header"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.esql.styling.density.height.header`

Optional:

- `max_lines` (Number) Maximum number of lines to use before header is truncated (for custom header height).
- `type` (String) Header height type. Valid values: 'auto', 'custom'.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--styling--density--height--value"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.esql.styling.density.height.value`

Optional:

- `lines` (Number) Number of lines to display per table body cell (for custom value height).
- `type` (String) Value height type. Valid values: 'auto', 'custom'.





<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.esql.filters`

Required:

- `filter_json` (String) Chart filter as normalized JSON. Must match the Kibana dashboard API for this chart: one of the filter union members (condition, group, DSL, or spatial) described in the dashboards OpenAPI specification.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--rows"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.esql.rows`

Required:

- `config_json` (String) Row configuration as JSON.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--esql--split_metrics_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.esql.split_metrics_by`

Required:

- `config_json` (String) Split metrics configuration as JSON.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.no_esql`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For standard datatables, this specifies the data view and query.
- `metrics` (Attributes List) Array of metric configurations as JSON. Each entry defines a datatable metric column. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql--metrics))
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql--query))
- `styling` (Attributes) Datatable styling and display configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql--styling))

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql--filters))
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `rows` (Attributes List) Array of row configurations as JSON. Each entry defines a row split operation. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql--rows))
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `split_metrics_by` (Attributes List) Array of split-metrics configurations as JSON. Each entry defines a split operation for metric columns. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql--split_metrics_by))
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql--metrics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.no_esql.metrics`

Required:

- `config_json` (String) Metric configuration as JSON.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.no_esql.query`

Required:

- `expression` (String) Filter expression string.

Optional:

- `language` (String) Query language (default: 'kql').


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql--styling"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.no_esql.styling`

Required:

- `density` (Attributes) Density configuration for the datatable. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql--styling--density))

Optional:

- `paging` (Number) Enables pagination and sets the number of rows to display per page.
- `sort_by_json` (String) Sort configuration as JSON. Only one column can be sorted at a time.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--datatable_config--no_esql--styling--density"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.datatable_config.no_esql.styling.density`
