<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.gauge_config`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For standard layers, this specifies the data view and query.
- `styling` (Attributes) Gauge styling configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config--styling))

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `esql_metric` (Attributes) Typed metric column for ES|QL gauges. Mutually exclusive with `metric_json`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config--esql_metric))
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config--filters))
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `metric_json` (String) Metric configuration as JSON. Supports metric operations such as count, unique count, min, max, average, median, standard deviation, sum, last value, percentile, percentile ranks, or formula.
 Required for non-ES|QL gauges; mutually exclusive with `esql_metric`.
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. Required for non-ES|QL gauges; omit for ES|QL mode. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config--query))
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config--styling"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.gauge_config.styling`

Optional:

- `shape_json` (String) Gauge shape configuration as JSON. Supports bullet and circular gauges.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config--esql_metric"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.gauge_config.esql_metric`

Required:

- `column` (String) ES|QL column name for the metric.
- `format_json` (String) Number or other format configuration as JSON (`formatType` union).

Optional:

- `color_json` (String) Gauge fill color configuration as JSON (`colorByValue`, `noColor`, or `autoColor` union).
- `goal` (Attributes) Goal column reference. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config--esql_metric--goal))
- `label` (String) Optional label for the metric.
- `max` (Attributes) Max column reference. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config--esql_metric--max))
- `min` (Attributes) Min column reference. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config--esql_metric--min))
- `subtitle` (String) Subtitle text rendered below the gauge value.
- `ticks` (Attributes) Tick configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config--esql_metric--ticks))
- `title` (Attributes) Title configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--gauge_config--esql_metric--title))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--heatmap_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.heatmap_config`

Required:

- `axis` (Attributes) Axis configuration for X and Y axes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--heatmap_config--axis))
- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For standard heatmaps, this specifies the data view or index; for ES|QL, this specifies the ES|QL query dataset.
- `legend` (Attributes) Legend configuration for the heatmap. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--heatmap_config--legend))
- `metric_json` (String) Metric configuration as JSON. For non-ES|QL, this can be a field metric, pipeline metric, or formula. For ES|QL, this is the metric column/operation/color configuration.
- `styling` (Attributes) Heatmap styling configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--heatmap_config--styling))
- `x_axis_json` (String) Breakdown dimension configuration for the X axis as JSON. This specifies the operation (e.g., `terms`, `date_histogram`, `histogram`, `range`, `filters`) and its parameters.

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--heatmap_config--filters))
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. Required for non-ES|QL heatmaps. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--heatmap_config--query))
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.
- `y_axis_json` (String) Breakdown dimension configuration for the Y axis as JSON. When omitted, the heatmap renders without a Y breakdown.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--heatmap_config--axis"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.heatmap_config.axis`

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--legacy_metric_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.legacy_metric_config`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. Use `dataView` or `index` for standard data sources, and `esql` or `table` for ES|QL sources.
- `metric_json` (String) Metric configuration as JSON. For standard datasets, use a metric operation or formula. For ES|QL datasets, include format, operation, column, and color configuration.

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--legacy_metric_config--filters))
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. Required for non-ES|QL datasets. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--legacy_metric_config--query))
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--legacy_metric_config--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.legacy_metric_config.filters`

Required:

- `filter_json` (String) Chart filter as normalized JSON. Must match the Kibana dashboard API for this chart: one of the filter union members (condition, group, DSL, or spatial) described in the dashboards OpenAPI specification.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--legacy_metric_config--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.legacy_metric_config.query`

Required:

- `expression` (String) Filter expression string.

Optional:

- `language` (String) Query language (default: 'kql').



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--metric_chart_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.metric_chart_config`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. Can be a data view dataset (`type: 'dataview'`), index dataset (`type: 'index'`), ES|QL dataset (`type: 'esql'`), or table ES|QL dataset (`type: 'tableESQLDatasetType'`).
- `metrics` (Attributes List) Array of metrics to display (1-2 items). Each metric can be a primary metric (displays prominently) or secondary metric (displays as comparison). Metrics can use field operations (count, unique count, min, max, avg, median, std dev, sum, last value, percentile, percentile ranks), pipeline operations (differences, moving average, cumulative sum, counter rate), formula operations, or for ES|QL datasets, column-based value operations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--metric_chart_config--metrics))

Optional:

- `breakdown_by_json` (String) Breakdown configuration as JSON. Groups metrics by a dimension. Can use operations like date histogram, terms, histogram, range, filters, or for ES|QL datasets, value operations with columns. Includes optional columns count and collapse_by configuration.
- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--metric_chart_config--filters))
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. Required for non-ES|QL datasets. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--metric_chart_config--query))
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--metric_chart_config--metrics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.metric_chart_config.metrics`

Required:

- `config_json` (String) Metric configuration as JSON. For primary metrics: includes type ('primary'), operation, format, alignments, icon, and optional fields like sub_label, fit, color, apply_color_to, and background_chart. For secondary metrics: includes type ('secondary'), operation, format, and optional fields like label, prefix, compare, and color.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--metric_chart_config--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.metric_chart_config.filters`

Required:

- `filter_json` (String) Chart filter as normalized JSON. Must match the Kibana dashboard API for this chart: one of the filter union members (condition, group, DSL, or spatial) described in the dashboards OpenAPI specification.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--metric_chart_config--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.metric_chart_config.query`

Required:

- `expression` (String) Filter expression string.

Optional:

- `language` (String) Query language (default: 'kql').



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--mosaic_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.mosaic_config`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For non-ES|QL, this specifies the data view or index; for ES|QL, this specifies the ES|QL query dataset.
- `group_breakdown_by_json` (String) Array of secondary breakdown dimensions as JSON (minimum 1). Mosaic charts require both group_by and group_breakdown_by. For non-ES|QL, each item can be date histogram, terms, histogram, range, or filters operations; for ES|QL, each item is the column/operation/color configuration.
- `legend` (Attributes) Legend configuration for the mosaic chart. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--mosaic_config--legend))

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `esql_group_by` (Attributes List) Breakdown columns for ES|QL mosaics. Mutually exclusive with `group_by_json`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--mosaic_config--esql_group_by))
- `esql_metrics` (Attributes List) Metric columns for ES|QL mosaics (exactly 1). Mutually exclusive with `metrics_json`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--mosaic_config--esql_metrics))
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--mosaic_config--filters))
- `group_by_json` (String) Array of primary breakdown dimensions as JSON (minimum 1). For non-ES|QL, each item can be date histogram, terms, histogram, range, or filters operations; for ES|QL, each item is the column/operation/color configuration.
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `metrics_json` (String) Array of metric configurations as JSON (exactly 1 required). For non-ES|QL, each item can be a field metric, pipeline metric, or formula; for ES|QL, each item is the column/operation/color/format configuration.
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. Required for non-ES|QL partition charts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--mosaic_config--query))
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.
- `value_display` (Attributes) Configuration for displaying values in chart cells. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--mosaic_config--value_display))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--mosaic_config--legend"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.mosaic_config.legend`

Required:

- `size` (String) Legend size: auto, s, m, l, or xl.

Optional:

- `nested` (Boolean) Show nested legend with hierarchical breakdown levels.
- `truncate_after_lines` (Number) Maximum lines before truncating legend items (1-10).
- `visible` (String) Legend visibility: auto, visible, or hidden.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--mosaic_config--esql_group_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.mosaic_config.esql_group_by`

Required:

- `collapse_by` (String) Collapse function when multiple rows map to the same bucket.
- `color_json` (String) Color mapping as JSON (`colorMapping` union).
- `column` (String) ES|QL column for the breakdown.

Optional:

- `format_json` (String) Column format as JSON (e.g. `{"type":"number"}`). Defaults to numeric format when omitted.
- `label` (String) Optional label for the group-by column.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--mosaic_config--esql_metrics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.mosaic_config.esql_metrics`

Required:

- `column` (String) ES|QL column name for the metric.
- `format_json` (String) Number or other format configuration as JSON (`formatType` union).

Optional:

- `label` (String) Optional label for the metric.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--mosaic_config--query"></a>

Optional:

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--pie_chart_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.pie_chart_config`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For standard layers, this specifies the data view and query.
- `metrics` (Attributes List) Array of metric configurations (minimum 1). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--pie_chart_config--metrics))

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `donut_hole` (String) Donut hole size: none (pie), s, m, or l.
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--pie_chart_config--filters))
- `group_by` (Attributes List) Array of breakdown dimensions (minimum 1). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--pie_chart_config--group_by))
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `label_position` (String) Position of slice labels: hidden, inside, or outside.
- `legend` (Attributes) Optional legend configuration for the pie chart. Same shape as treemap and mosaic legends; Terraform `visible` maps to API `visibility`. When omitted, the schema default matches typical Kibana legend defaults (size and visibility `auto`) so apply/read stay consistent. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--pie_chart_config--legend))
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--pie_chart_config--query))
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--pie_chart_config--metrics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.pie_chart_config.metrics`

Required:

- `config_json` (String) Metric configuration as JSON.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--pie_chart_config--group_by"></a>

- `config_json` (String) Group by configuration as JSON.

### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.pie_chart_config.legend`

Required:

- `size` (String) Legend size: auto, s, m, l, or xl.

Optional:

- `nested` (Boolean) Show nested legend with hierarchical breakdown levels.
- `truncate_after_lines` (Number) Maximum lines before truncating legend items (1-10).
- `visible` (String) Legend visibility: auto, visible, or hidden.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--pie_chart_config--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.pie_chart_config.query`

- `expression` (String) Filter expression string.

Optional:

- `language` (String) Query language (default: 'kql').



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--region_map_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.region_map_config`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For ES|QL, this specifies the ES|QL query. For standard layers, this specifies the data view and query.
- `metric_json` (String) Metric configuration as JSON. For ES|QL, this defines the metric column and format. For standard mode, this defines the metric operation or formula.
- `region_json` (String) Region configuration as JSON. For ES|QL, this defines the region column and EMS join. For standard mode, this defines the bucket operation (terms, histogram, range, filters) and optional EMS settings.

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--region_map_config--filters))
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. Required for non-ES|QL region map configurations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--region_map_config--query))
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--region_map_config--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.region_map_config.filters`

Required:

- `filter_json` (String) Chart filter as normalized JSON. Must match the Kibana dashboard API for this chart: one of the filter union members (condition, group, DSL, or spatial) described in the dashboards OpenAPI specification.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--region_map_config--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.region_map_config.query`

Required:

- `expression` (String) Filter expression string.

Optional:

- `language` (String) Query language (default: 'kql').



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--tagcloud_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.tagcloud_config`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For standard layers, this specifies the data view and query.

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `esql_metric` (Attributes) Typed metric column for ES|QL tagclouds. Mutually exclusive with `metric_json`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--esql_metric))
- `esql_tag_by` (Attributes) Typed tag-by column for ES|QL tagclouds. Mutually exclusive with `tag_by_json`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--esql_tag_by))
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--filters))
- `font_size` (Attributes) Minimum and maximum font size for the tags. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--font_size))
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `metric_json` (String) Metric configuration as JSON. Can be a field metric operation (count, unique count, min, max, avg, median, std dev, sum, last value, percentile, percentile ranks), a pipeline operation (differences, moving average, cumulative sum, counter rate), or a formula operation.
 Required for non-ES|QL tagclouds; mutually exclusive with `esql_metric`.
- `orientation` (String) Orientation of the tagcloud. Valid values: 'horizontal', 'vertical', 'angled'.
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. Required for non-ES|QL tagclouds; omit for ES|QL mode. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--query))
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `tag_by_json` (String) Tag grouping configuration as JSON. Can be a date histogram, terms, histogram, range, or filters operation. This determines how tags are grouped and displayed. Required for non-ES|QL tagclouds; mutually exclusive with `esql_tag_by`.
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--esql_metric"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.esql_metric`

Required:

- `column` (String) ES|QL column name for the metric.
- `format_json` (String) Number or other format configuration as JSON (`formatType` union).

Optional:

- `label` (String) Optional label for the metric.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--esql_tag_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.esql_tag_by`

Required:

- `color_json` (String) Color mapping as JSON (`colorMapping` union).
- `column` (String) ES|QL column for the tag dimension.
- `format_json` (String) Column format as JSON (`formatType` union).

Optional:

- `label` (String) Optional label for the tag-by column.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.filters`

Required:

- `filter_json` (String) Chart filter as normalized JSON. Must match the Kibana dashboard API for this chart: one of the filter union members (condition, group, DSL, or spatial) described in the dashboards OpenAPI specification.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--font_size"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.font_size`

Optional:

- `max` (Number) Maximum font size (default: 72, maximum: 120).
- `min` (Number) Minimum font size (default: 18, minimum: 1).


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--tagcloud_config--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.tagcloud_config.query`

Required:

- `expression` (String) Filter expression string.

Optional:

- `language` (String) Query language (default: 'kql').



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.treemap_config`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For non-ES|QL, this specifies the data view or index; for ES|QL, this specifies the ES|QL query dataset.
- `legend` (Attributes) Legend configuration for the treemap chart. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config--legend))

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `esql_group_by` (Attributes List) Breakdown columns for ES|QL treemaps. Mutually exclusive with `group_by_json`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config--esql_group_by))
- `esql_metrics` (Attributes List) Metric columns for ES|QL treemaps. Mutually exclusive with `metrics_json`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config--esql_metrics))
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config--filters))
- `group_by_json` (String) Array of breakdown dimensions as JSON (minimum 1). For non-ES|QL, each item can be date histogram, terms, histogram, range, or filters operations; for ES|QL, each item is the column/operation/color configuration.
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `metrics_json` (String) Array of metric configurations as JSON (minimum 1). For non-ES|QL, each item can be a field metric, pipeline metric, or formula; for ES|QL, each item is the column/operation/color/format configuration.
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. Required for non-ES|QL partition charts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config--query))
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.
- `value_display` (Attributes) Configuration for displaying values in chart cells. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config--value_display))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config--legend"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.treemap_config.legend`

Required:

- `size` (String) Legend size: auto, s, m, l, or xl.

Optional:

- `nested` (Boolean) Show nested legend with hierarchical breakdown levels.
- `truncate_after_lines` (Number) Maximum lines before truncating legend items (1-10).
- `visible` (String) Legend visibility: auto, visible, or hidden.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config--esql_group_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.treemap_config.esql_group_by`

Required:

- `collapse_by` (String) Collapse function when multiple rows map to the same bucket.
- `color_json` (String) Color mapping as JSON (`colorMapping` union).
- `column` (String) ES|QL column for the breakdown.

Optional:

- `format_json` (String) Column format as JSON (e.g. `{"type":"number"}`). Defaults to numeric format when omitted.
- `label` (String) Optional label for the group-by column.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config--esql_metrics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.treemap_config.esql_metrics`

Required:

- `color` (Attributes) Static color for the metric. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config--esql_metrics--color))
- `column` (String) ES|QL column name for the metric.
- `format_json` (String) Number or other format configuration as JSON (`formatType` union).

Optional:

- `label` (String) Optional label for the metric.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--treemap_config--esql_metrics--color"></a>

### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.treemap_config.filters`

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--waffle_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.waffle_config`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For non-ES|QL, this specifies the data view or index; for ES|QL, this specifies the ES|QL query dataset.
- `legend` (Attributes) Legend configuration for the waffle chart. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--waffle_config--legend))

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `esql_group_by` (Attributes List) Breakdown columns for ES|QL waffles. Mutually exclusive with `group_by`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--waffle_config--esql_group_by))
- `esql_metrics` (Attributes List) Metric columns for ES|QL waffles (minimum 1). Mutually exclusive with `metrics`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--waffle_config--esql_metrics))
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--waffle_config--filters))
- `group_by` (Attributes List) Breakdown dimensions for non-ES|QL waffles. Each `config_json` is a JSON object (terms, date_histogram, etc.) matching the Kibana Lens waffle schema. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--waffle_config--group_by))
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this chart. Default is false.
- `metrics` (Attributes List) Metric configurations for non-ES|QL waffles (minimum 1). Each `config_json` is a JSON object (e.g. count, sum, or formula) matching the Kibana Lens waffle schema. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--waffle_config--metrics))
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. Required for non-ES|QL partition charts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--waffle_config--query))
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.
- `value_display` (Attributes) Configuration for displaying values in chart cells. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--waffle_config--value_display))

- `size` (String) Legend size: auto, s, m, l, or xl.

Optional:

- `truncate_after_lines` (Number) Maximum lines before truncating legend items (1-10).
- `values` (List of String) Legend value display modes. For example `absolute` shows raw metric values in the legend.
- `visible` (String) Legend visibility: auto, visible, or hidden.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config`

Required:

- `axis` (Attributes) Axis configuration for X, Y, and secondary Y axes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis))
- `decorations` (Attributes) Visual enhancements and styling options for the chart. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--decorations))
- `fitting` (Attributes) Missing data interpolation configuration. Only valid fitting types are applied per chart type. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--fitting))
- `layers` (Attributes List) Chart layers configuration. Minimum 1 layer required. Each layer can be a data layer or reference line layer. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers))
- `legend` (Attributes) Legend configuration for the XY chart. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--legend))

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the chart.
- `filters` (Attributes List) Additional filters to apply to the chart data (maximum 100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--filters))
- `query` (Attributes) Query configuration for filtering data. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--query))
- `title` (String) The title of the chart displayed in the panel.

### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis`

- `x` (Attributes) X-axis (horizontal) configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--x))
- `y` (Attributes) Primary Y-axis configuration with scale and bounds. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y))
- `y2` (Attributes) Secondary Y-axis configuration with scale and bounds. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y2))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--x"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis.x`

Optional:

- `domain_json` (String) Axis domain configuration as JSON. Can be 'fit' mode or 'custom' mode with min, max, and optional fit flags.
- `grid` (Boolean) Whether to show grid lines for this axis.
- `label_orientation` (String) Orientation of the axis labels.
- `scale` (String) X-axis scale: linear (numeric), ordinal (categorical), or temporal (dates).
- `ticks` (Boolean) Whether to show tick marks on the axis.
- `title` (Attributes) Axis title configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--x--title))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--x--title"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis.x.title`

Optional:

- `value` (String) Axis title text.
- `visible` (Boolean) Whether to show the title.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis.y`

Required:

- `domain_json` (String) Y-axis domain configuration as JSON. Can be 'fit' mode or 'custom' mode with min, max, and optional fit flags.

Optional:

- `grid` (Boolean) Whether to show grid lines for this axis.
- `label_orientation` (String) Orientation of the axis labels.
- `scale` (String) Y-axis scale type for data transformation.
- `ticks` (Boolean) Whether to show tick marks on the axis.
- `title` (Attributes) Axis title configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y--title))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y--title"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis.y.title`

Optional:

- `value` (String) Axis title text.
- `visible` (Boolean) Whether to show the title.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y2"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis.y2`

Required:

- `domain_json` (String) Y-axis domain configuration as JSON. Can be 'fit' mode or 'custom' mode with min, max, and optional fit flags.

Optional:

- `grid` (Boolean) Whether to show grid lines for this axis.
- `label_orientation` (String) Orientation of the axis labels.
- `scale` (String) Y-axis scale type for data transformation.
- `ticks` (Boolean) Whether to show tick marks on the axis.
- `title` (Attributes) Axis title configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y2--title))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--axis--y2--title"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.axis.y2.title`

Optional:

- `value` (String) Axis title text.
- `visible` (Boolean) Whether to show the title.




<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--decorations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.decorations`

Optional:

- `fill_opacity` (Number) Area chart fill opacity (0-1 typical, max 2 for legacy).
- `line_interpolation` (String) Line interpolation method.
- `minimum_bar_height` (Number) Minimum bar height in pixels.
- `point_visibility` (String) Show data points on lines. Valid values are: auto, always, never.
- `show_current_time_marker` (Boolean) Show current time marker line.
- `show_end_zones` (Boolean) Show end zones for partial buckets.
- `show_value_labels` (Boolean) Display value labels on data points.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--fitting"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.fitting`

Required:

- `type` (String) Fitting function type for missing data.

Optional:

- `dotted` (Boolean) Show fitted values as dotted lines.
- `end_value` (String) How to handle the end value for fitting.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.layers`

Required:

- `type` (String) The type of layer. Valid values: 'area', 'line', 'bar', 'horizontal_bar', 'reference_lines' for NoESQL layers; 'area_chart', 'line_chart', 'bar_chart', 'horizontal_bar_chart', 'reference_lines' for ESQL layers.

Optional:

- `data_layer` (Attributes) Configuration for data layers (area, line, bar charts). Mutually exclusive with `reference_line_layer`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--data_layer))
- `reference_line_layer` (Attributes) Configuration for reference line layers. Mutually exclusive with `data_layer`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--reference_line_layer))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--data_layer"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.layers.data_layer`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For ES|QL layers, this specifies the ES|QL query. For standard layers, this specifies the data view and query.
- `y` (Attributes List) Array of Y-axis metrics. Each entry defines a metric to display on the Y-axis. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--data_layer--y))

Optional:

- `breakdown_by_json` (String) Split series configuration as JSON. For ES|QL: column, operation, optional collapse_by, and color mapping. For standard: field, operation, and optional parameters.
- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this layer. Default is false.
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
- `x_json` (String) X-axis configuration as JSON. For ES|QL: column and operation. For standard: field, operation, and optional parameters.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--data_layer--y"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.layers.data_layer.y`

Required:

- `config_json` (String) Y-axis metric configuration as JSON. For ES|QL: axis, color, column, and operation. For standard: axis, color, and metric definition.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--reference_line_layer"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.layers.reference_line_layer`

Required:

- `data_source_json` (String) Dataset configuration as JSON. For ES|QL layers, this specifies the ES|QL query. For standard layers, this specifies the data view and query.
- `thresholds` (Attributes List) Array of reference line thresholds. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--reference_line_layer--thresholds))

Optional:

- `ignore_global_filters` (Boolean) If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this layer. Default is false.
- `sampling` (Number) Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--layers--reference_line_layer--thresholds"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.layers.reference_line_layer.thresholds`

Optional:

- `axis` (String) Which axis the reference line applies to. Valid values: 'left', 'right'.
- `color_json` (String) Color for the reference line. Can be a static color string or dynamic color configuration as JSON.
- `column` (String) Column to use (for ES|QL layers).
- `fill` (String) Fill direction for reference line. Valid values: 'none', 'above', 'below'.
- `icon` (String) Icon to display on the reference line. Valid values: 'alert', 'asterisk', 'bell', 'bolt', 'bug', 'circle', 'editorComment', 'flag', 'heart', 'mapMarker', 'pinFilled', 'starEmpty', 'starFilled', 'tag', 'triangle'.
- `operation` (String) Operation to apply (for ES|QL: aggregation function; for standard: metric calculation type).
- `stroke_dash` (String) Line style. Valid values: 'solid', 'dashed', 'dotted'.
- `stroke_width` (Number) Line width in pixels.
- `text` (String) Text display option for the reference line. Valid values include: 'auto', 'name', 'none', 'label'.
- `value_json` (String) Metric configuration as JSON (for standard layers). Defines the calculation for the threshold value.




<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--legend"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.legend`

Optional:

- `alignment` (String) Legend alignment when positioned inside the chart. Valid when 'inside' is true.
- `columns` (Number) Number of legend columns when positioned inside the chart (1-5). Valid when 'inside' is true.
- `inside` (Boolean) Position legend inside the chart. When true, use 'columns' and 'alignment'. When false or omitted, use 'position' and 'size'.
- `position` (String) Legend position when positioned outside the chart. Valid when 'inside' is false or omitted.
- `size` (String) Legend size when positioned outside the chart. Valid for left/right outside legends. Values use the Kibana API enum: auto, s, m, l, xl.
- `statistics` (List of String) Statistics to display in legend (maximum 17).
- `truncate_after_lines` (Number) Maximum lines before truncating legend items (1-10).
- `visibility` (String) Legend visibility (auto, visible, hidden).


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.filters`

Required:

- `filter_json` (String) Chart filter as normalized JSON. Must match the Kibana dashboard API for this chart: one of the filter union members (condition, group, DSL, or spatial) described in the dashboards OpenAPI specification.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--lens_dashboard_app_config--by_value--xy_chart_config--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.lens_dashboard_app_config.by_value.xy_chart_config.query`

Required:

- `expression` (String) Filter expression string.

Optional:

- `language` (String) Query language (default: 'kql').





<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--markdown_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.markdown_config`

Optional:

- `by_reference` (Attributes) Reference an existing markdown library item via `ref_id`. Optional `description`, `hide_title`, `title`, and `hide_border`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--markdown_config--by_reference))
- `by_value` (Attributes) Inline markdown: required `content` and nested `settings` (API `settings` object). Optional `description`, `hide_title`, `title`, and `hide_border`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--markdown_config--by_value))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--markdown_config--by_reference"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.markdown_config.by_reference`

Required:

- `ref_id` (String) Unique identifier of the markdown library item (API `ref_id`). The provider does not verify the item exists at plan time.

Optional:

- `description` (String) Optional panel description.
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the panel border.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the panel title.
- `title` (String) Optional panel title.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--markdown_config--by_value"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.markdown_config.by_value`

Required:

- `content` (String) Markdown source for the panel body (API `content`).
- `settings` (Attributes) Required settings object for by-value markdown. `open_links_in_new_tab` is optional; when unset, Kibana applies its default (`true`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--markdown_config--by_value--settings))

Optional:

- `description` (String) Optional panel description.
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the panel border.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the panel title.
- `title` (String) Optional panel title.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--markdown_config--by_value--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.markdown_config.by_value.settings`

Optional:

- `open_links_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, links in the markdown open in a new tab. When omitted, Kibana defaults to true.




<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--options_list_control_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.options_list_control_config`

Required:

- `data_view_id` (String) The ID of the data view that the control is tied to.
- `field_name` (String) The name of the field in the data view that the control is tied to.

Optional:

- `display_settings` (Attributes) Display preferences for the control widget. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--options_list_control_config--display_settings))
- `exclude` (Boolean) When true, selected options are used as an exclusion filter rather than an inclusion filter.
- `exists_selected` (Boolean) When true, the control filters for documents where the field exists.
- `ignore_validations` (Boolean) Whether the control skips field-level validation against the data view.
- `run_past_timeout` (Boolean) When true, the control continues to show results even when the underlying query times out.
- `search_technique` (String) The technique used to match suggestions. Must be one of `prefix`, `wildcard`, or `exact` when set.
- `selected_options` (List of String) The initially or persistently selected option values. All values are represented as strings.
- `single_select` (Boolean) When true, only one option may be selected at a time.
- `sort` (Attributes) Default sort configuration for the suggestion list. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--options_list_control_config--sort))
- `title` (String) Human-readable label displayed above the control.
- `use_global_filters` (Boolean) Whether the control applies the dashboard's global filters to its own query.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--options_list_control_config--display_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.options_list_control_config.display_settings`

Optional:

- `hide_action_bar` (Boolean) When true, hides the action bar on the control.
- `hide_exclude` (Boolean) When true, hides the exclude toggle.
- `hide_exists` (Boolean) When true, hides the exists filter option.
- `hide_sort` (Boolean) When true, hides the sort control.
- `placeholder` (String) Placeholder text shown when no option is selected.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--options_list_control_config--sort"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.options_list_control_config.sort`

Required:

- `by` (String) The field or criterion to sort by. Must be one of `_count` or `_key`.
- `direction` (String) The sort direction. Must be one of `asc` or `desc`.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--range_slider_control_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.range_slider_control_config`

Required:

- `data_view_id` (String) The ID of the data view that the control is tied to.
- `field_name` (String) The name of the field in the data view that the control is tied to.

Optional:

- `ignore_validations` (Boolean) Whether to suppress validation errors during intermediate states.
- `step` (Number) The step size for the range slider. Stored as float32 to match the Kibana API type and avoid refresh drift.
- `title` (String) A human-readable title for the control.
- `use_global_filters` (Boolean) Whether the control respects dashboard-level filters.
- `value` (List of String) Initial range as a list of exactly 2 strings: [min, max].


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_alerts_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_alerts_config`

Required:

- `slos` (Attributes List) SLO entries whose alerts this panel displays (at least one, at most 100). Each entry references an SLO by `slo_id`; set `slo_instance_id` only when the SLO is grouped and you need a specific instance. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_alerts_config--slos))

Optional:

- `description` (String) Optional panel description.
- `drilldowns` (Attributes List) Optional URL drilldown links (at most 100). The embeddable fixes `trigger` to `on_open_panel_menu` and `type` to `url_drilldown` when writing to the Kibana API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_alerts_config--drilldowns))
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, hides the panel border.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, hides the panel title.
- `title` (String) Optional panel title.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_alerts_config--slos"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_alerts_config.slos`

Required:

- `slo_id` (String) Identifier of the SLO to include.

Optional:

- `slo_instance_id` (String) SLO instance ID when the SLO uses grouping. Omit for all instances (API default `"*"`). Unset values stay null when the API echoes that default (REQ-009).


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_alerts_config--drilldowns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_alerts_config.drilldowns`

Required:

- `label` (String) Display label shown in the drilldown menu.
- `url` (String) Templated URL for the drilldown.

Optional:

- `encode_url` (Boolean) When true, the URL is percent-encoded. Omit to use the API default.
- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, the URL opens in a new browser tab. Omit to use the API default.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_burn_rate_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_burn_rate_config`

Required:

- `duration` (String) Duration for the burn rate chart in the format `[value][unit]`, where unit is `m` (minutes), `h` (hours), or `d` (days). For example: `5m`, `3h`, `6d`.
- `slo_id` (String) The ID of the SLO to display the burn rate for.

Optional:

- `description` (String) Optional panel description.
- `drilldowns` (Attributes List) Optional list of URL drilldowns attached to the panel. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_burn_rate_config--drilldowns))
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, hides the panel border.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, hides the panel title.
- `slo_instance_id` (String) ID of the SLO instance. Set when the SLO uses `group_by`; identifies which instance to show. Omit to show all instances (API default `"*"`).
- `title` (String) Optional panel title.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_burn_rate_config--drilldowns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_burn_rate_config.drilldowns`

Required:

- `label` (String) Display label shown in the drilldown menu.
- `url` (String) Templated URL for the drilldown.

Optional:

- `encode_url` (Boolean) When true, the URL is percent-encoded. Omit to use the API default.
- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, the URL opens in a new browser tab. Omit to use the API default.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_error_budget_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_error_budget_config`

Required:

- `slo_id` (String) The ID of the SLO to display the error budget for.

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description of the panel.
- `drilldowns` (Attributes List) URL drilldowns to configure on the panel. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_error_budget_config--drilldowns))
- `hide_border` (Boolean) Hide the border of the panel.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) Hide the title of the panel.
- `slo_instance_id` (String) ID of the SLO instance. Set when the SLO uses group_by; identifies which instance to show. Defaults to `*` (all instances) when omitted.
- `title` (String) The title displayed in the panel header.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_error_budget_config--drilldowns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_error_budget_config.drilldowns`

Required:

- `label` (String) The label displayed for the drilldown.
- `url` (String) Templated URL. Variables documented at https://www.elastic.co/docs/explore-analyze/dashboards/drilldowns#url-template-variable

Optional:

- `encode_url` (Boolean) When true, the URL is escaped using percent encoding. Defaults to `true` when omitted.
- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, the drilldown URL opens in a new browser tab. Defaults to `true` when omitted.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_overview_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_overview_config`

Optional:

- `groups` (Attributes) Configuration for a grouped SLO overview panel. Mutually exclusive with `single`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_overview_config--groups))
- `single` (Attributes) Configuration for a single-SLO overview panel. Mutually exclusive with `groups`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_overview_config--single))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_overview_config--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_overview_config.groups`

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description displayed on the panel.
- `drilldowns` (Attributes List) URL drilldowns attached to the panel. The trigger (`on_open_panel_menu`) and type (`url_drilldown`) are set automatically. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_overview_config--groups--drilldowns))
- `group_filters` (Attributes) Optional filters for grouped SLO overview mode. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_overview_config--groups--group_filters))
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, the panel border is hidden.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, the panel title is hidden.
- `title` (String) The title displayed on the panel.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_overview_config--groups--drilldowns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_overview_config.groups.drilldowns`

Required:

- `label` (String) The display label for the drilldown link.
- `url` (String) The URL template for the drilldown. Variables are documented at https://www.elastic.co/docs/explore-analyze/dashboards/drilldowns#url-template-variable.

Optional:

- `encode_url` (Boolean) When true, the URL is percent-encoded.
- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, the drilldown URL opens in a new browser tab.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_overview_config--groups--group_filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_overview_config.groups.group_filters`

Optional:

- `filters_json` (String) AS-code filter array as a JSON string. Accepts the polymorphic filter schema (condition, group, DSL, spatial).
- `group_by` (String) Group SLOs by this field. Valid values are `slo.tags`, `status`, `slo.indicator.type`, `_index`.
- `groups` (List of String) List of group values to include (maximum 100).
- `kql_query` (String) KQL query string to filter the SLOs shown in the group overview.



<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_overview_config--single"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_overview_config.single`

Required:

- `slo_id` (String) The unique identifier of the SLO to display.

Optional:

- `description` (String) The description displayed on the panel.
- `drilldowns` (Attributes List) URL drilldowns attached to the panel. The trigger (`on_open_panel_menu`) and type (`url_drilldown`) are set automatically. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_overview_config--single--drilldowns))
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, the panel border is hidden.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, the panel title is hidden.
- `remote_name` (String) The name of the remote cluster where the SLO is defined.
- `slo_instance_id` (String) The SLO instance ID. Set when the SLO uses group_by; identifies which instance to display. Defaults to `*` (all instances) when omitted.
- `title` (String) The title displayed on the panel.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--slo_overview_config--single--drilldowns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.slo_overview_config.single.drilldowns`

Required:

- `label` (String) The display label for the drilldown link.
- `url` (String) The URL template for the drilldown. Variables are documented at https://www.elastic.co/docs/explore-analyze/dashboards/drilldowns#url-template-variable.

Optional:

- `encode_url` (Boolean) When true, the URL is percent-encoded.
- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean) When true, the drilldown URL opens in a new browser tab.




<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_monitors_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.synthetics_monitors_config`

Optional:

- `description` (String) Descriptive text for the panel.
- `filters` (Attributes) Optional filter configuration for the Synthetics monitors panel. Omit to show all monitors. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_monitors_config--filters))
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the panel border in the dashboard.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the panel title in the dashboard.
- `title` (String) Display title shown in the panel header.
- `view` (String) View mode for the panel. Valid values are `cardView` and `compactView`.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_monitors_config--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.synthetics_monitors_config.filters`

Optional:

- `locations` (Attributes List) Filter by monitor locations. Each entry has a `label` (display name) and a `value` (location ID). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_monitors_config--filters--locations))
- `monitor_ids` (Attributes List) Filter by monitor IDs. Each entry has a `label` (display name) and a `value` (monitor ID). The Kibana API accepts up to 5000 items. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_monitors_config--filters--monitor_ids))
- `monitor_types` (Attributes List) Filter by monitor types. Each entry has a `label` (display name) and a `value` (monitor type, e.g. `browser`, `http`, `tcp`, `icmp`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_monitors_config--filters--monitor_types))
- `projects` (Attributes List) Filter by project. Each entry has a `label` (display name) and a `value` (project ID). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_monitors_config--filters--projects))
- `tags` (Attributes List) Filter by tags. Each entry has a `label` (display name) and a `value` (tag). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_monitors_config--filters--tags))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_monitors_config--filters--locations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.synthetics_monitors_config.filters.locations`

Required:

- `label` (String) Display label for the filter option.
- `value` (String) Value for the filter option.

Required:

- `value` (String) Value for the filter option.

Required:

- `label` (String) Display label for the filter option.
- `value` (String) Value for the filter option.


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_monitors_config--filters--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.synthetics_monitors_config.filters.tags`

Required:

- `label` (String) Display label for the filter option.
- `value` (String) Value for the filter option.




<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_stats_overview_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.synthetics_stats_overview_config`

Optional:

- `description` (String) Descriptive text for the panel.
- `drilldowns` (Attributes List) Optional list of URL drilldown actions attached to the panel. The API allows up to 100 drilldowns per panel. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_stats_overview_config--drilldowns))
- `filters` (Attributes) Optional Synthetics monitor filter constraints. Each filter category accepts a list of `{ label, value }` objects. Omit the block or individual categories to apply no filtering for those dimensions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_stats_overview_config--filters))
- `hide_border` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the panel border in the dashboard.
- `hide_title` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the panel title in the dashboard.
- `title` (String) Display title shown in the panel header.

### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.synthetics_stats_overview_config.drilldowns`

Required:

- `label` (String)
- `url` (String)

Optional:

- `encode_url` (Boolean)
- `open_in_new_tab` (Boolean)


<a id="nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_stats_overview_config--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.synthetics_stats_overview_config.filters`

Optional:

- `locations` (Attributes List) Filter by monitor location. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_stats_overview_config--filters--locations))
- `monitor_ids` (Attributes List) Filter by monitor ID. The API accepts up to 5000 entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_stats_overview_config--filters--monitor_ids))
- `monitor_types` (Attributes List) Filter by monitor type (e.g. `browser`, `http`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_stats_overview_config--filters--monitor_types))
- `projects` (Attributes List) Filter by Synthetics project. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_stats_overview_config--filters--projects))
- `tags` (Attributes List) Filter by monitor tag. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--panels--synthetics_stats_overview_config--filters--tags))

### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.synthetics_stats_overview_config.filters.locations`

Required:

### Nested Schema for `sections.panels.synthetics_stats_overview_config.filters.monitor_ids`
